calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. specially appeared for the plaintiff. Pursuant to plaintiff's request, the court ordered the case dismissed with the court retaining jurisdiction per CCP 664.6. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)
